ogTitle: Woy Woy vs Wrathall: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Woy Woy and Wrathall.
heading: Woy Woy vs Wrathall — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woy Woy, New South Wales and Wrathall, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wrathall has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Woy Woy (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woy Woy or Wrathall safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woy Woy has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Wrathall scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woy Woy scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Wrathall scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woy Woy or Wrathall?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wrathall has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
